description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 45 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 18 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment and a smaller zipped compartmentOne zipped compartment on the front with organiser pouchesTwo elasticated pockets on both sides for enhanced spacePadded haul loop for easy carryingTwo adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and stitch detailing on the frontCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
